name: Omelette Basquaise
recipeIngredient: 1 bell pepper, cut into small pieces
5-inch piece of chorizo, cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the potatoes, bell pepper, and onion until well done or slightly crisp, according to personal preference.
2. Add the chorizo and eggs to the pan. Mix everything together over low heat.
3. When ready, fold the omelette in half. Cook for two minutes on one side.
4. Flip the omelette using a spatula and cook for an additional two minutes on the other side.
5. Serve the omelette on a platter with slices of tomato sprinkled with parsley. This makes a delicious light dinner, paired with a green salad dressed in oil and vinegar.
